# Standup Generator

> Generate fake standup meeting updates that sound convincingly productive.

## Tech Stack
- React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion, canvas-confetti, html2canvas, Lucide React

## Key Files
- src/App.tsx — main application entry
- src/components/ — UI components (generator, bingo board, calendar, achievements)
- src/hooks/ — custom React hooks
- src/data/ — role templates, buzzword pools, achievement definitions
- src/utils/ — text generation utilities

## Features
- Buzzword density slider, 6 roles, standup bingo, speedrun mode
- Copy-to-Slack, calendar widget, 12 achievements, shareable cards

## URLs
- Live: https://standup-generator.netlify.app
- Repo: https://github.com/arnoldwender/standup-generator
